message.content:
@startuml
title SnapHelper

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageAlignment left
  ArrowColor #222222
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #f6b6c1
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #e9e9f6
}

actor snap as Snap

box "SnapHelper" #bfe3ee
participant "OnFlingListener" as OFL
participant "OnScrollListener" as OSL
participant "SnapHelper" as SH
participant "LinearSmoothScroller" as LSS
end box

activate Snap

OFL -> OFL : onFling
OFL -> SH : snapFromFling
SH -> Snap : findTargetSnapPosition

SH -> LSS : createSnapScroller
LSS --> SH : onTargetFound

SH -> Snap : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap

OSL -> OSL : onScrollStateChanged
OSL -> SH : snapToTargetExistingView
SH -> Snap : findSnapView
SH -> Snap : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap

deactivate Snap
@enduml
